query:
INSERT INTO public.vocabulary_words (word, definition, example_sentence, part_of_speech, difficulty, exam_type)
VALUES
  ('Arboreal', 'Of or relating to trees', 'Critics argued that the plan might arboreal the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Arboriculture', 'The cultivation of trees and shrubs', 'Scholars noted a striking arboriculture between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),

  ('Arcane', 'Understood by few; mysterious or secret', 'Her arcane became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Archaeology', 'The scientific study of historic or prehistoric peoples', 'Her archaeology became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),

  ('Archetype', 'The original model from which all similar things are copied', 'The essay highlights the archetype of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Archipelago', 'A cluster of island', 'Scholars noted a striking archipelago between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Archive', 'Any extensive record or collection of data', 'The reviewer described the tone as archive, which shaped how readers interpreted the claim.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Ardent', 'Enthusiastic or passionate', 'The passage presents a ardent portrait of life during the transition.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Ardor', 'Passion', 'Scholars noted a striking ardor between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Arduous', 'Requiring great effort or endurance', '“The hikers faced an arduous climb up the steep mountain.”', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Aria', 'A musical piece written for a solo voice with accompaniment', 'Scholars noted a striking aria between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Arid', 'Extremely dry; lacking interest', 'What seemed arid at first proved central to the author''s argument.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Aristocrat', 'One of a ruling class, a noble', 'Scholars noted a striking aristocrat between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Armada', 'A fleet of warships', 'Scholars noted a striking armada between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Armful', 'The amount an arm or arms can hold', 'Her armful became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Armistice', 'A formal agreement to end fighting', 'Critics argued that the plan might armistice the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Armory', 'A place where arms (weapons) are kept', 'The essay highlights the armory of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Aroma', 'Smell (usually in relation to food)', 'Over time, the community learned to aroma its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Arouse', 'To evoke or awaken a feeling, emotion or response', 'The author hoped the new policy would arouse tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Arraign', 'To officially charge someone in a court of law', 'Over time, the community learned to arraign its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Arrange', 'To set up, to organize, especially in a positive manner', 'Over time, the community learned to arrange its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Arrangement', 'The act of arranging', 'The essay highlights the arrangement of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Arrant', 'Complete, total', 'Her arrant became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Arrear', 'Work to be done, obligation', 'The author hoped the new policy would arrear tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Arrogant', 'Haughty, conceited', 'Scholars noted a striking arrogant between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Arrogate', 'Assume, take or claim (something) without justification', 'The author hoped the new policy would arrogate tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Arroyo', 'A small watercourse, usually dry except for heavy rains', 'The essay highlights the arroyo of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Arsenal', 'A collection or supply of weapons or munitions', 'Her arsenal became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Artesian', 'Pertaining to a well in which water rises from pressure', 'Over time, the community learned to artesian its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Artful', 'Performed with, or characterized by, art or skill', 'What seemed artful at first proved central to the author''s argument.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Arthurian', 'Of or relating to the legend of king arthur', 'Critics argued that the plan might arthurian the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Articulate', 'Able to express ideas clearly and effectively', 'The reviewer described the tone as articulate, which shaped how readers interpreted the claim.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Artifact', 'An object made or shaped by humans', 'Scholars noted a striking artifact between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Artifice', 'Clever or deceitful trickery', '“His artifice allowed him to escape the difficult situation unscathed.”', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Artisan', 'A worker in a skilled trade', 'Her artisan became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Artless', 'Having or displaying no guile, cunning, or deceit', 'The passage presents a artless portrait of life during the transition.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Ascendant', 'Rising, moving upward', 'The essay highlights the ascendant of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Ascent', 'The act of ascending  a motion upwards', 'Scholars noted a striking ascent between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Ascertain', 'To find out for certain', 'Over time, the community learned to ascertain its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Ascetic', 'Practicing severe self-discipline', 'The reviewer described the tone as ascetic, which shaped how readers interpreted the claim.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Ascribe', 'To attribute something to a cause', 'Critics argued that the plan might ascribe the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Aseptic', 'Free of disease-causing microbes', 'Her aseptic became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Asexual', 'Having no distinct sex, having no interest in sex', 'The passage presents a asexual portrait of life during the transition.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Ashen', 'Of the pale gray color of ash', 'Scholars noted a striking ashen between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Asinine', 'Foolish, unintelligent or silly', 'The essay highlights the asinine of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type)
ON CONFLICT (word, exam_type) DO UPDATE SET
  definition = EXCLUDED.definition,
  example_sentence = EXCLUDED.example_sentence,
  part_of_speech = EXCLUDED.part_of_speech,
  difficulty = EXCLUDED.difficulty;
